required_skills: Strategic thinking and first-principles problem solving
Data-driven decision making and analytical reasoning
Presentation design and storytelling with data
Operational problem-solving in ambiguous, fast-paced environments
Structured written communication and memo writing
preferred_skills: Prior experience in management consulting, investment banking, or venture capital
Familiarity with SaaS business models and startup metrics (ARR, MRR, churn, LTV)
Experience conducting competitive intelligence and industry landscape analysis
Basic financial modeling and unit economics understanding
Exposure to fundraising processes and investor relations
Comfort working directly with C-suite or founder-level leadership
Experience in early-stage or high-growth startup environments
responsibilities: Act as a strategic extension of the Founder by owning high-priority research, analysis, and execution projects across business functions
Prepare board decks, investor updates, and executive briefings that synthesize complex data into clear, actionable narratives
Conduct in-depth market research and competitive landscape analysis to inform product, GTM, and fundraising strategy
Identify operational bottlenecks across teams and design scalable processes and SOPs to eliminate recurring inefficiencies
Manage cross-functional initiatives end-to-end, coordinating stakeholders across product, engineering, sales, and operations
Track and report on company-wide KPIs, OKRs, and strategic milestones, surfacing risks and recommendations to the Founder
Lead special projects and pilot programs on behalf of the Founder, from scoping through execution and post-mortem
Facilitate weekly leadership syncs, capture decisions, and drive accountability on action items across the leadership team
Support due diligence and data room preparation for fundraising rounds or strategic partnership discussions
Represent the Founder's perspective in cross-functional meetings and ensure strategic intent is translated into operational plans
